category_sources: Official GitHub README describes urlscan as a Mutt and terminal URL selector.
source_facts.description says it views and selects URLs in an email message or file.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is Urlscan.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains purpose, setup, command-line usage, theming, and keybinding documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official firecat53/urlscan GitHub repository.
tags_sources: Official README describes Mutt integration, URL scanning, and terminal selection.
source_facts.description describes selecting URLs in email or files.
